text:
is an event that occurs in Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel.

Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA

Armaros uses the original Spear of Longinus to create a force field named Longinus Curtain that isolates the Earth from the rest of the universe. It does this by unfurling the spear into a radiant line before hurling it at the Earth. Ultimately, Armaros dispels the Longinus Curtain when it it returns to orbiting around Earth, allowing everyone to see the Moon (which had been obscured by the Longinus Curtain).
